api_key.description: Bearer token. If omitted, the LOGFIRE_API_KEY environment variable is used.

base_url.description: Base URL for the Logfire API. If omitted, the provider uses LOGFIRE_BASE_URL or infers the SaaS endpoint from the api_key region. Self-hosted customers should set this explicitly.

block.description: Configure the Logfire API endpoint and credentials used by all resources.

active.description: Whether the alert is active (defaults to true on creation).

channel_ids.description: Set of channel IDs to notify.

notify_when.description: Notification rule. Must match API enum.

project_id.description: Project ID (UUID) used for alert API paths.

query.description: SQL / query string used by the alert.

watermark.description: Provider-managed watermark (lateness tolerance) sent to the API.

id.description: Dashboard UUID assigned by the backend.

project_id.description: Project UUID used for API paths.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the organization was created.

deletion_protection.description: Prevents accidental destroy when true (defaults to true). Set to false and apply before deleting this resource.

display_name.description: Display name shown in the UI.

has_admin_panel.description: Whether the organization has access to the admin panel.

id.description: Organization UUID assigned by the backend.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the organization was last updated.

block.description: Manages a Logfire organization. This resource is only available for self-hosted deployments and requires an API key with a special organization scope.

id.description: Opaque backend project ID (not the slug).

name.description: Project name/slug. Must be unique within the organization.

organization.description: Organization name. Computed from the API and cannot be set.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the token was created.

created_by_name.description: Display name of the user that created the token.

description.description: Description is fixed to "Created by Public API" for provider-managed tokens.

expires_at.description: Optional RFC3339 expiration timestamp for the token (for example `2026-12-31T23:59:59Z`). If omitted, the token does not expire.

project_id.description: UUID of the project that owns the token.

project_name.description: Name of the project that owns the token.

token.description: The generated read token. Only returned on creation.

token_prefix.description: Prefix of the generated read token.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the token was created.

created_by_name.description: Display name of the user that created the token.

description.description: Description is fixed to "Created by Public API" for provider-managed tokens.

expires_at.description: Optional RFC3339 expiration timestamp for the token (for example `2026-12-31T23:59:59Z`). If omitted, the token does not expire.

project_id.description: UUID of the project that owns the token.

project_name.description: Name of the project that owns the token.

token.description: The generated write token. Only returned on creation.

token_prefix.description: Prefix of the generated write token.
